SegmentUpscaleRunner.description: Split a long video into queued segments, run any custom processing chain per segment, and optionally merge the outputs.

total_frames.name: Total Frames
total_frames.tooltip: Total video frame count. Connect this to the frame_count output of VHS_LoadVideo.

frame_rate.name: Frame Rate
frame_rate.tooltip: Video frame rate. Connect this to the fps output of VHS_LoadVideo.

segment_count.name: Segment Count
segment_count.tooltip: How many segments to split the video into.

start_segment.name: Start Segment
start_segment.tooltip: Segment number to start from. Use this for manual resume.

overlap_frames.name: Model Context Overlap
overlap_frames.tooltip: Input frames read from the previous segment as temporal context for upscale/denoise models.

execute.name: Execute
execute.tooltip: Off = preview the segment plan only. On = start the queued segment run.

trimmer_node_id.name: Final Dedup Trimmer ID
trimmer_node_id.tooltip: Node ID of SegmentFrameTrimmer. Place it after RIFE/VFI and before VHS_VideoCombine.

bridge_trimmer_node_id.name: Pre-VFI Bridge Trimmer ID
bridge_trimmer_node_id.tooltip: Node ID of SegmentVfiBridgeTrimmer. Place it after upscale/denoise and before RIFE/VFI to avoid interpolating the full overlap.

vfi_bridge_frames.name: VFI Bridge Frames
vfi_bridge_frames.tooltip: How many previous-tail frames to keep before RIFE/VFI. Use 1 for most interpolation workflows; try 2 if boundaries wobble.

trim_multiplier_override.name: Interpolation Output Multiplier
trim_multiplier_override.tooltip: 0 = auto-detect the RIFE/VFI multiplier upstream of the final trimmer. Set 2, 4, etc. if auto detection fails.

prune_cleanup_debug_nodes.name: Skip Preview/Debug Branches
prune_cleanup_debug_nodes.tooltip: Skip preview, show, debug, and old cleanup branches in each child prompt. This is not memory cleanup.

clear_segment_history.name: Clear Segment History
clear_segment_history.tooltip: Delete each completed child prompt from ComfyUI history after recording its output path.

merge_segments.name: Merge Segments
merge_segments.tooltip: Use ffmpeg concat to merge all segment videos when the run finishes.

merged_filename_prefix.name: Merged Filename Prefix
merged_filename_prefix.tooltip: Filename prefix for the merged video.

enable_checkpoint.name: Enable Checkpoint
enable_checkpoint.tooltip: Write a checkpoint after each successful segment.

auto_resume_checkpoint.name: Auto Resume Checkpoint
auto_resume_checkpoint.tooltip: Resume from checkpoint next_seg when a checkpoint exists.

clear_checkpoint_on_finish.name: Clear Checkpoint On Finish
clear_checkpoint_on_finish.tooltip: Delete the checkpoint automatically after all segments finish.

pre_segment_paths.name: Pre-Segment Paths
pre_segment_paths.tooltip: Comma-separated paths to already finished segment videos. They will be placed before new outputs when merging.

reference_image_node_id.name: Reference Image Node ID
reference_image_node_id.tooltip: Optional. Node ID of a LoadImage-like node to replace per segment.

segment_reference_images.name: Segment Reference Images
segment_reference_images.tooltip: Optional comma-separated image paths or filenames. If fewer than segments, the last image is reused.

audio_mode.name: Audio Mode
audio_mode.tooltip: keep_original = keep current audio wiring; segment_from_loadvideo = cut audio from source video per segment; disable_audio = remove audio.

segment_io_mode.name: Segment Input Mode
segment_io_mode.tooltip: frame_window = default skip/cap mode; physical_slices = first cut the source into small input videos, then process one file per segment.

physical_slice_subdir.name: Physical Slice Folder
physical_slice_subdir.tooltip: Source slices go to input/folder/timestamp/source, and results go to output/folder/timestamp/results.

physical_slice_crf.name: Slice CRF
physical_slice_crf.tooltip: H.264 CRF for intermediate slice videos. 12 is high quality; 0 is near-lossless but very large.

reuse_physical_slices.name: Reuse Slices
reuse_physical_slices.tooltip: Reuse existing source slices when resuming the same timestamp.

SegmentFrameTrimmer.description: Trim duplicate bridge frames before saving. SegmentUpscaleRunner controls it automatically.

trim_frames.name: Auto Output Trim Frames
trim_frames.tooltip: Written automatically by SegmentUpscaleRunner. Do not edit manually in normal use.

tail_trim_frames.name: Auto Tail Trim Frames
tail_trim_frames.tooltip: Written automatically by SegmentUpscaleRunner to remove duplicate VFI padding at segment tails.

SegmentVfiBridgeTrimmer.description: Place after upscale/denoise and before RIFE/VFI. It keeps only the bridge frames needed for interpolation.

trim_frames.name: Auto Context Trim Frames
trim_frames.tooltip: Written automatically by SegmentUpscaleRunner. Do not edit manually in normal use.

SegmentRunLogViewer.description: Show Segment Upscale Runner logs inside the ComfyUI canvas.

runner_node_id.name: Runner Node ID
runner_node_id.tooltip: Node ID of SegmentUpscaleRunner. Leave empty to show all in-memory runner logs.

max_lines.name: Max Lines
max_lines.tooltip: Maximum number of log lines to display.

clear_after_read.name: Clear After Read
clear_after_read.tooltip: Clear this runner log after reading. Empty runner_node_id will not clear all logs.

SegmentVideoInfoProbe.description: Read only video metadata and output frame count/fps without loading IMAGE tensors. Useful for physical slice mode.

video.name: Video
video.tooltip: Source video filename or path. Input-folder filenames are supported.

force_rate.name: Force FPS
force_rate.tooltip: Match VHS_LoadVideo.force_rate. Use 0 to keep the source FPS.

frame_load_cap.name: Frame Load Cap
frame_load_cap.tooltip: Total frames to process. 0 means process until the end after skip.
